name: RedSocks Tor Connection
description: RedSocks Tor connection detected. Tor is a free and open-source software for enabling anonymous communication. Adversaries may use Tor for C2 communication or to download malicious payloads. This detection is triggered when an unusual Tor connection is detected from a host. This prompt helps investigate the source of the Tor connection and determine if it's a legitimate system behavior or a malicious one.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the Tor connection from host `{hostname}` to the Tor network at `{timestamp}`. The connection was initiated by a process with PID `{process_id}`. Analyze the user (`{user_name}`) associated with the process and any other network traffic to or from this host. Determine if this is a legitimate use of Tor or a malicious attempt to communicate with a C2 server. Provide a summary of your findings and recommend an incident response plan.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname of the affected host.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: The Process ID of the process that initiated the connection.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.
